config.name: CPG Morning Brief — Revenue

data.dsp_query: SELECT date_trunc('day', order_date) AS d, region, SUM(amount) AS rev FROM public.sales WHERE order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 50

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject)-[:DOMAIN_OF]->(d:Domain {name: 'Sales'}) RETURN o.id AS id, d.name AS domain LIMIT 20

external.searxng_query: {{ user_state.get('topics_of_interest', ['cpg revenue'])[0] if user_state else 'cpg revenue' }} news

config.name: Weekly Sell-Through Analysis

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, SUM(units_sold) AS units_sold, AVG(inventory_available) AS avg_inventory, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(units_sold) / NULLIF(SUM(units_sold) + AVG(inventory_available), 0), 1) AS sell_through_pct FROM public.stock_level WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY sku, category ORDER BY sell_through_pct ASC

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(c:Category) RETURN s.sku AS sku, c.name AS category, s.target_sell_through AS target LIMIT 50

config.name: Stock Urgency Ranking

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, current_stock, projected_daily_demand, CEIL(current_stock::float / NULLIF(projected_daily_demand, 0)) AS days_of_cover FROM public.stock_level WHERE current_stock < 100 ORDER BY days_of_cover ASC LIMIT 10

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku {supplier_lead_days: {lead_days}}) RETURN s.sku, s.supplier_id, s.supplier_lead_days LIMIT 20

config.name: Price Anomaly Explainer

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, region, current_price, previous_price, price_delta_pct, price_change_date, avg_regional_price FROM public.price_changes WHERE price_change_id = %(anomaly_id)s LIMIT 1

semantic.cypher: MATCH (p:PricePoint {region: {region}, category: {category}}) RETURN p.avg_price, p.std_dev LIMIT 1

config.name: Promo Lift Post-Analysis

data.dsp_query: SELECT promo_id, campaign_name, start_date, end_date, SUM(promo_revenue) - SUM(baseline_revenue) AS revenue_lift, SUM(promo_units) - SUM(baseline_units) AS unit_lift, COUNT(DISTINCT sku) AS skus_in_promo FROM public.promotions WHERE end_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY promo_id, campaign_name, start_date, end_date ORDER BY revenue_lift DESC LIMIT 10

semantic.cypher: MATCH (promo:Promotion)-[:TARGETS]->(sku:Sku) RETURN promo.name, COUNT(sku) AS sku_count, COLLECT(sku.category) AS categories

config.name: Category KPI Heatmap

data.dsp_query: SELECT category, SUM(revenue) AS revenue, AVG(gross_margin_pct) AS margin, COUNT(DISTINCT sku) AS sku_count, SUM(units) AS units, AVG(return_rate_pct) AS return_rate FROM public.category_metrics WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC

semantic.cypher: MATCH (c:Category) RETURN c.name, c.strategic_priority, c.growth_target LIMIT 20

config.name: Supplier Scorecard

data.dsp_query: SELECT supplier_id, supplier_name, ROUND(AVG(on_time_delivery_pct), 1) AS otd, ROUND(AVG(quality_score), 2) AS quality, ROUND(AVG(lead_time_days), 1) AS lead_time, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count FROM public.suppliers WHERE last_order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY supplier_id, supplier_name ORDER BY otd DESC

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[r:SUPPLIES]->(sku:Sku) RETURN s.name, s.risk_level, COUNT(sku) AS sku_count

config.name: SKU Description Refiner

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, current_title, current_description, ingredients, net_weight, uom FROM public.sku_master WHERE last_updated < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' LIMIT 20

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku {sku: {sku_id}})-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(a:Attribute) RETURN s.sku, COLLECT(a.name) AS attributes
